name: linSetMasterRequestDirtyFlag
title: linSetMasterRequestDirtyFlag
description: Sets the dirty flag for the LIN master request frame (frame identifier=0x3C). The master request only gets transmitted when the dirty flag is set.
The dirty flag also gets set implicitly with every data update on the master request.

parameters.name: dirty
parameters.description: 0: clear the dirty flag1: set the dirty flag

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
